target.title: fix: fallback after active media wake failure
target.body:
## Summary

- Follow up the superseded broader fallback PR #84371 with the narrowed remaining behavior gap only.
- Allow generated-media direct fallback after an active requester wake is attempted and fails, while preserving the active-session path when the wake succeeds.
- Keep the #84006 canonical behavior: fallback sends only media URLs still missing from message-tool delivery.
- Update generated-media docs so image, music, video, media overview, and task docs describe fallback after inactive requester sessions or failed active wakes.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts` -> 2 files, 114 tests passed.
- `pnpm format:check -- src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts` -> passed.
- `pnpm docs:list` -> passed.
- `pnpm format:check -- docs/automation/tasks.md docs/tools/image-generation.md docs/tools/media-overview.md docs/tools/music-generation.md docs/tools/video-generation.md` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean before the docs-only follow-up; no accepted/actionable findings reported.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Generated-media completion fallback now covers the active-session failure path left after #84006. If OpenClaw first tries to wake an active requester session, that wake fails, and the requester-agent handoff misses some generated media, OpenClaw sends one idempotent direct fallback containing only the still-missing media URLs. This is the focused follow-up requested after https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84371 was closed as overlapping the canonical #84006 fix.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `codex/media-active-wake-fallback`, head `fed4a8de41b545a8acba4818025c2230acc6e7fa`, with qa-channel + qa-lab bus synthetic Slack-class transport. The proof used real `deliverSubagentAnnouncement` and real durable outbound `sendMessage`; only the active-wake result and requester-agent response were controlled so the branch was deterministic. No external channel credentials, live user data, or secrets were used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a one-off `node --import tsx --input-type=module` script that started `startQaBusServer`, built `createQaChannelGatewayConfig`, registered `qaChannelPlugin` in the active plugin registry with a media-capable qa-lab bus adapter, invoked `deliverSubagentAnnouncement`, forced active wake attempts to fail with `transcript_commit_wait_unsupported` then `no_active_run`, and returned requester-agent evidence that only `/tmp/generated-robot-1.png` was delivered through the message tool. Then reran `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix:

```json
{
  "deliveryResult": { "delivered": true, "path": "direct" },
  "activeWakeAttempts": [
    {
      "sessionId": "requester-session-qa",
      "waitForTranscriptCommit": true,
      "sourceReplyDeliveryMode": "message_tool_only"
    },
    {
      "sessionId": "requester-session-qa",
      "waitForTranscriptCommit": false,
      "sourceReplyDeliveryMode": "message_tool_only"
    }
  ],
  "requesterAgentCalls": [
    {
      "method": "agent",
      "deliver": false,
      "sourceReplyDeliveryMode": "message_tool_only",
      "idempotencyKey": "runtime-active-wake-proof"
    }
  ],
  "outboundMessages": [
    {
      "conversation": { "id": "media-proof", "kind": "channel" },
      "text": "The generated image is ready.",
      "attachments": [
        {
          "kind": "image",
          "mimeType": "image/png",
          "fileName": "generated-robot-2.png",
          "url": "/tmp/generated-robot-2.png"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: The active requester wake was attempted with transcript wait, retried without transcript wait, then marked failed. The requester-agent handoff ran in `message_tool_only` mode and reported only `/tmp/generated-robot-1.png` as delivered, so the direct fallback posted exactly `/tmp/generated-robot-2.png` through the qa-channel outbound boundary. The focused Vitest run passed with `Test Files 2 passed (2)` and `Tests 114 passed (114)`.

What was not tested: No live Discord/Slack/Telegram external transport was run. The runtime proof uses qa-channel + qa-lab bus to exercise the OpenClaw dispatch/outbound boundary without external credentials, and the unit regression keeps the active-wake success and missing-media fallback branches covered.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.author: fuller-stack-dev
